metadata.title: YourSign Verifier
metadata.description: Verify a YourSign signature on-chain. No server in the path.

page.eyebrow: Read-only · No backend in the path
page.subtitle: Drop a signed PDF. The canonical hash is recomputed in your browser, and verification queries Solana via a public RPC — without going through our backend (AC-5.1.2).

form.dropSubline: hash computed in your browser, on-chain via public RPC — no backend in the path

result.notFound: ✗ Hash not found in the devnet program. PDF was not anchored on-chain or bytes differ from the registered version.
result.found: ✓ Document found on-chain. Hash matches the on-chain record.
